analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: xAI is shipping aggressively but still trails on adoption — only a handful of tracked tools list Grok in their built_on_models. The 1M context puts it nominally on par with Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5 Pro, but the integration story (no Anthropic/OpenAI-equivalent SDKs maintained by partner ecosystems) keeps it niche. Worth tracking the gap between technical capability and ecosystem adoption — Grok has the former, not the latter.
